subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The One, the Single, maketh mention of thee from this praiseworthy station, and hath revealed unto thee that which shall draw thee nigh unto Him in every condition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یذکرک الفرد الاحد من هذا المقام المحمود و انزل لک ما یقربک الیه فی کل الاحوال
subcodes.subjects: @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @chastisement and requital
